---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for a new project or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which project does this affect?**
e.g. an existing folder under `src/`, or a new PoC idea

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or links here.
